name: X-Golf West Des Moines
address: 165 S Jordan Creek Pkwy Suite 135, West Des Moines, IA 50266
about: X-Golf West Des Moines is a golf simulator venue featuring state-of-the-art indoor technology. The facility offers 7 golf simulators equipped with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for accurate play. It operates with a pay-per-bay-hour model and accommodates up to 6 people per bay, making it suitable for both individual players and groups. The venue combines golf simulation with a full bar, restaurant, and event space, creating a multifunctional environment for recreation, dining, and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from advanced simulator technology
Flexible booking system with capacity for up to 6 people per bay
Full bar and restaurant options for dining and socializing
League and event opportunities for competitive and social play
Professional golf instruction available with Eric Peyton

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom simulator system with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but you can use your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has a full bar and restaurant on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour for an individual to play 18 holes, or 2 hours for two people to play 18 holes each.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages, making it suitable for families.
